channel.title: Provyx - Healthcare Provider Data Guides
channel.description: Guides and articles on healthcare provider data, sales prospecting, and data quality.

item.title: The Hidden Cost of Bad Healthcare Provider Data
item.description: Bad provider data costs healthcare vendors millions in wasted outreach, lost deals, and damaged sender reputation. Learn where the costs hide and fix them.

item.title: NPI Registry: What It Gives You and What It Doesn't
item.description: Understand what's in the CMS NPI Registry and what's missing. A practical guide to NPI data fields, limitations, and how to fill gaps for outreach.

item.title: Build a Healthcare Marketing List That Converts
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building healthcare marketing lists that drive results. Data sources, verification, and segmentation for provider outreach.

item.title: Provider Data Buying Guide 2026: Top 7 Vendor Factors
item.description: Updated for 2026: Compare healthcare provider data vendors. Learn about sourcing, verification, pricing, and avoiding red flags. Get current info.

item.title: Healthcare CRM Data Decay in 2026: Rates and Solutions
item.description: In 2026, 20-30% of healthcare CRM data decays annually. Learn why provider data goes stale faster than other B2B data, plus strategies to maintain.

item.title: Healthcare ABM Strategy: Target Practices First
item.description: Build a healthcare ABM strategy that targets practices as accounts. Account identification, multi-threading, and data requirements for ABM campaigns.

item.title: Medical Device Territory Planning with Provider Data
item.description: Plan medical device sales territories using verified provider data. Step-by-step guide to mapping surgeons, balancing workloads, and optimizing coverage.

item.title: ROI of Clean Provider Data for Healthcare Marketing
item.description: Calculate the ROI of investing in clean healthcare provider data. Framework for measuring revenue impact of better contacts and deliverability.

item.title: How to Build a Physician Prospect List for B2B Sales
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building a physician prospect list that converts. Covers ICP definition, data sources, verification, and list-to-pipeline workflow.

item.title: NPPES vs Commercial Provider Data: 2026 Accuracy
item.description: Updated for 2026: NPPES data vs. paid provider data. See a direct accuracy comparison, what the free download misses, and when to invest in paid data.

item.title: Selling to Medical Practices in 2026: B2B Sales Guide
item.description: Updated for 2026: Selling to medical practices is different. Learn key decision-makers, ownership structures, and compliance for faster B2B sales cycles.

item.title: B2B Healthcare Lead Generation: Strategies for 2026
item.description: Generate B2B healthcare leads in 2026 using provider data. Outbound vs. inbound, data strategies, and measurement frameworks. Updated for current compliance.

item.title: How to Clean Healthcare Provider Data in Salesforce
item.description: A practical guide to auditing and cleaning healthcare provider data in Salesforce. Covers deduplication, NPI matching, address validation, and ongoing maintenance.

item.title: Healthcare Data Providers for Small Teams (2026)
item.description: Updated for 2026: Healthcare data providers ranked for small sales teams. Find NPI-verified contacts with per-record pricing and no contracts.

item.title: Healthcare Provider Firmographic Data: What It Is and Why It Matters
item.description: What healthcare provider firmographic data includes and how it differs from standard B2B firmographics. Covers key fields, use cases, and how to build a firmographic dataset.

item.title: Healthcare Account Planning: A Data-Driven Template
item.description: A practical healthcare account planning template for sales reps. Covers org structure, buying committees, installed technology, physician census, and action planning with provider data.

item.title: Data-Driven Cold Calling for Healthcare Sales
item.description: How to use provider data for pre-call research in healthcare sales. Covers the 5-minute research workflow, call timing, data-informed openers, and gatekeeper navigation.

item.title: B2B Healthcare Email: CAN-SPAM Rules in 2026 (Not HIPAA)
item.description: Updated for 2026: CAN-SPAM, not HIPAA, governs B2B healthcare emails. Avoid common mistakes and legal risks. 7 key compliance rules explained.

item.title: Value Analysis Committee Guide: Hospital Approval Tips
item.description: Updated April 2026: Navigate Value Analysis Committees. Who sits on them, submission tips, how to build a financial case, and win hospital approval.

item.title: GPO Contracts: Medical Device Vendor Guide 2026
item.description: Updated for 2026: Navigate medical device GPO contracts. Understand major GPOs, tiers, & direct contracting vs. GPO channels. 96% of hospitals use GPOs.

item.title: The Hospital Buying Cycle: A Data-Mapped Guide for Vendors
item.description: A practical guide to the hospital buying cycle for vendors. Covers the 19+ month timeline, buying committee roles, budget cycles, fiscal year timing, and how to use provider data to identify where a hospital is in the cycle.

item.title: Healthcare Data Vendor Comparison 2026: 8 Providers
item.description: April 2026 update: We tested 8 healthcare data vendors (IQVIA, Definitive, ZoomInfo & more) on pricing and accuracy. Find out who ranks highest now.

item.title: KOL Identification for Medical Device Companies
item.description: How medical device companies identify key opinion leaders (KOLs). Covers surgical KOL identification, procedure volume analysis, tiered engagement strategies, and data sources for finding emerging KOLs.

item.title: Pre-RFP Healthcare Sales Playbook: Win Deals in 2026
item.description: 60-70% of healthcare RFPs are decided early. Learn how pre-RFP intelligence helps sales teams win in 2026 using tech install data and timing strategies.

item.title: Medical Device Territory Assessment: Your First 90 Days
item.description: A practitioner-level playbook for new medical device reps inheriting a territory. Week-by-week guide covering data audit, provider census, account tiering, and execution planning.

item.title: PECOS Data for Sales: What It Tells You in 2026
item.description: Updated for 2026: Use PECOS data for B2B sales prospecting. See provider Medicare enrollment status, billing relationships, and practice details beyond.

item.title: How to Find Physician Email Addresses for B2B Outreach
item.description: Practical guide to finding physician email addresses for B2B sales outreach. Covers legitimate sources, the problem with scraped lists, verification methods, compliance basics, and how to evaluate email data vendors.

item.title: Oral Pathologists Email List: Verified Contact Data
item.description: Get a verified oral pathologists email list with NPI data, business emails, and practice details. Accurate contact data for dental and diagnostics outreach.

item.title: Naturopathic Doctors Email List 2026: Verified Contacts
item.description: Updated for April 2026: Get a verified naturopathic doctors email list with direct contacts. Includes NPI data and licensing status in 50+ states.

item.title: Periodontist Email List: Verified Implant-Ready Data
item.description: Get a verified periodontist email list with NPI data, direct emails, and practice details. Built for implant companies, dental suppliers, and sales teams.

item.title: Physiatrist Email List 2026: 10,000+ Verified PM&R
item.description: Updated for 2026: Reach 10,000+ physiatrists with NPI-verified email addresses. Target PM&R practices, pain management, and sports medicine specialists.

item.title: IV Infusion Therapy Email List: Clinical and Wellness
item.description: Get a verified IV infusion therapy email list covering clinical infusion centers and wellness IV bars. Direct emails, phones, and practice classification.

item.title: LASIK Surgeons Email List: Verified Refractive Data
item.description: Get a verified LASIK surgeons email list with direct emails, NPI data, and practice details. Built for laser manufacturers and ophthalmology sales teams.

item.title: Med Spa Owners List 2026: 8,000+ Verified Contacts
item.description: Updated for April 2026: Find 8,000+ med spa owners (not just medical directors). Direct emails & phone numbers for decision-makers nationwide.

item.title: Chiropractor Email List: 70,000+ Verified DC Contacts
item.description: Access a verified chiropractor email list with 70,000+ DC contacts. NPI data, direct emails, and practice details for supplement and equipment outreach.

item.title: Acupuncturist Email List: 35,000+ LAc Contacts
item.description: Most vendors miss cash-pay acupuncturists (no NPI). We combine NPI data, NCCAOM records, and business listings to catch the 30% other lists skip.

item.title: Spravato Marketing: Provider Data for Treatment Centers
item.description: Reach Spravato-certified treatment centers with verified provider data. Contact lists for pharma reps, marketing agencies, and patient referral services.

item.title: Healthcare Software ABM in 2026: Targeting Practices
item.description: Updated for 2026: Run healthcare software ABM with verified provider data. Target practices by size (3-20 providers), specialty, and EHR tech stack.

item.title: Psychiatrists Email List: Verified Contact Data
item.description: Get a verified psychiatrists email list with NPI data, sub-specialty filters, and direct emails. Accurate contacts for pharma and CME outreach.

item.title: Therapists Email List: Verified Mental Health Contacts
item.description: Get a verified therapists email list with credential types, direct emails, and practice details. Accurate data for EHR vendors and CE providers.

item.title: Nursing Homes Contact Database: Verified Facility Data
item.description: Get a verified nursing homes contact database with administrator emails, bed counts, and CMS star ratings. Accurate facility data for vendor outreach.

item.title: Retirement Communities Email List: Verified Contacts
item.description: Get a verified retirement communities email list with administrator contacts, unit counts, and care-level data. Reach ILFs, ALFs, CCRCs, and 55+ communities.

item.title: Pediatric Dentists Email List: Verified Contacts
item.description: Get a verified pediatric dentists email list with NPI data, direct emails, and practice details. Accurate contacts for dental suppliers and CE providers.

item.title: Oral Surgeons Email List: Verified OMS Contacts
item.description: Get a verified oral surgeons email list with NPI data, practice setting, and hospital affiliations. Accurate OMS contacts for implant and device sales.

item.title: Orthodontists Email List: Verified Contact Data
item.description: Get a verified orthodontists email list with NPI data, practice type, and aligner capability signals. Accurate contacts for dental tech and supply sales.

item.title: Rheumatologists Email List: Verified Contact Data
item.description: Get a verified rheumatologists email list with NPI data, infusion capability, and practice setting. Accurate contacts for biologics and pharma outreach.

item.title: Optometrists Email List: Verified OD Contact Data
item.description: Get a verified optometrists email list with NPI data, practice ownership, and optical affiliations. Accurate OD contacts for lens and equipment sales.

item.title: Midwife Email List: Verified CNM Contact Data
item.description: Get a verified midwife email list with credential types, practice settings, and birth center affiliations. Accurate CNM and CPM contacts for outreach.
